name: Peanut Butter and Jelly Tamales
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix jam and peanut butter.
2. Fill and cook tamales according to "Tamales: Basic Procedure."
3. Per serving (2 tamales): 554 cal; 8 g prot; 267 mg sod; 89 g carb; 17 g fat; 0 mg chol; 19 mg calcium.
4. Vegetarian Gourmet, Summer 1993/MM by DEEANNE
